final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original traditional Chinese ink-wash landscape painting (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a 水墨 (ink-wash) aesthetic with classical 山水画 sensibility — exact brushwork, ink gradation, and 留白 treatment are yours
Composition: must include deliberate 留白 (negative space) to evoke 空灵 atmosphere; near-far layering with foreground, midground, and distant mountains
Subject: must include:
  - 远山 (distant mountains, misty and dark like indigo)
  - 云雾 (drifting clouds and mist wrapping the mountains)
  - 松树 (pine trees in the foreground)
  - 茅草屋 (thatched cottage in the near scene)
  - 老者 (an elderly figure fishing alone by the stream)
  - 溪流 (a stream or brook in the foreground)
Scene/backdrop: must include layered mountain landscape with mist-shrouded peaks receding into distance
Lighting/mood: needs a 悠远空灵 (serene, ethereal, timeless) atmosphere — exact tonal mood is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained ink-wash direction — monochromatic or near-monochromatic with subtle ink gradations — exact ink tones are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional 宣纸 (xuan paper) texture with visible brushstroke quality — exact paper grain and ink bleed are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 东方美学 visual sensibility with proper 留白 — do not fill the composition edge-to-edge
Avoid:
